title: ASE 2025 paper on test suite evolution accepted
description: Our work "Comprehend, Imitate, and then Update: Unleashing the Power of LLMs in Test Suite Evolution" was accepted by ASE 2025.

title: ECAI 2025 paper on LoRA Decompose accepted
description: Our paper "LoRA Decompose: Serving Fine-Tuned Models into LoRA-Like" was accepted by ECAI 2025.

title: Started LLM algorithm internship at ByteDance
description: Joined ByteDance as an intern working on code-oriented large language model algorithms.

title: ISSTA 2025 paper on loop invariant inference accepted
description: Our paper "Clause2Inv: A Generate-Combine-Check Framework for Loop Invariant Inference" was accepted by ISSTA 2025.
